name: SCC_WeldingDetectionRes
title: SCC_WeldingDetectionRes
syntax: void SCC_WeldingDetectionRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode, float EVSEPresentVoltage )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Welding Detection Response is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
